headline: Trial Set in NEC Multidistrict Litigation Against Reckitt Benckiser’s Mead Johnson Led by Levin Papantonio
summary: LONDON & PENSACOLA, Fla., March 05, 2026--Reckitt Benckiser (LON: RKT) subsidiary Mead Johnson is facing a bellwether trial in the US Multidistrict Litigation (MDL) over infant formula product Enfamil linked to necrotizing enterocolitis (NEC) scheduled for 6 July 2026. NEC is a severe intestinal disease that can cause tissue death and life-threatening infections in premature babies. Levin Papantonio attorney Andy Childers is Plaintiffs’ Co-Lead Counsel in the MDL.

headline: Cancer tests are becoming more precise and guiding pharma R&D
summary: Abbott’s major takeover of Exact Sciences showcases a rising push to leverage cancer tests in precision oncology therapy and R&D.

headline: Balloon Catheter Market Competitive Landscape Report 2025: Key Players Analysis, Profiles, Strategic Developments, Mergers, Product Innovations, Revenue Insights, and Future Forecasts to 2033
summary: The Balloon Catheter market is projected to grow from $5.04 Billion in 2025 to $8.51 Billion by 2033, driven by a CAGR of 6.75%. This growth stems from increased cardiovascular disease cases and demand for minimally invasive surgeries. Advancements in drug-eluting and specialty balloons enhance procedures like angioplasty. Key players include Abbott, Becton Dickinson, and Teleflex. Aging populations and healthcare investments fuel market expansion, despite challenges like product recalls. Contin
